arts.ttl: 'It depends' - Pep Guardiola warns Man City over breaking January transfer rule
arts.sum: Manchester City are looking at strengthening the squad in the January transfer market but Pep Guardiola knows it will be difficult

arts.ttl: Aston Villa v Man City: FPL team news + predicted line-ups
arts.sum: Team form, absentees and our predicted XIs The post Aston Villa v Man City: FPL team news + predicted line-ups appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola reveals approximately when Manchester City will have their fate decided on 115 charges
arts.sum: Manchester City is currently facing a staggering 115 charges of alleged financial misconduct, a situation that has cast a shadow over the club's recent achievements and future prospects. I n a recent press conference, Pep Guardiola, the esteemed manager of Manchester City, provided a key update on the club's ongoing legal saga.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs Man City: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Man City visit Aston Villa in the Premier League on Saturday. Preview includes team news, predicted lineups, how to watch on TV and more.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola: Manchester City boss admits defeat in Premier League title race without new transfers
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola admits he Manchester City will not win the Premier League title unless he is given new players to compete with Liverpool and Chelsea.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola hints at new Manchester City 115 charges decision time line as verdict draws near
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola has given a clearer picture as to when Manchester City will discover their fate against Premier League charges

arts.ttl: Man City will look to sign THREE new players in January in bid to save their season - but Pep Guardiola fears rip-off prices during search
arts.sum: JACK GAUGHAN: City will try to reignite their season by swooping for up to three players in next month's transfer window, but Guardiola fears the club will not get value for money.

arts.ttl: I convinced Jack Grealish to stay at Aston Villa after Manchester United agents took him for dinner
arts.sum: Former manager Alex McLeish has spoken about how he helped Aston Villa keep the teenage Jack Grealish, after hearing he was speaking to representatives who were tempting him to sign for Manchester United. The 29-year-old has gone on to win three Premier League titles, a Champions League and an FA Cup as well as the FIFA Club World Cup and UEFA Super Cup. However, it seems Grealish could have easily moved to the red half of Manchester instead.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa boss Unai Emery makes 'something special' remark ahead of Man City clash
arts.sum: "It is a target, clearly and we want to feel comfortable again and strong at Villa Park," Emery said when asked if his team can embark on another long winning run at home. Unai Emery's side are also on a seven-match unbeaten home run in the Premier League, while their only defeat in the past 13 top-flight games at Villa Park was 2-0 against Arsenal in August.

arts.ttl: Kyle Walker's teammates asked security to 'remove' Lauryn Goodman from bar
arts.sum: Lauryn Goodman was asked by security to leave an area of a London bar after she was seen downing shots bought by Kyle Walker's teammate, Jordan Pickford
